overall.description: A bus simulator game showing a first-person view from the driver's cabin during a heavy rainstorm. The bus navigates through urban streets, stopping at traffic lights and following other vehicles including a taxi and a large truck. Rain streaks across the windshield as wipers operate continuously.

events.description: bus is stopped at red traffic light behind a white taxi

agents.ego_description: bus driver waiting at the red light with windshield wipers active

notable_agents.action: white taxi stopped at red light directly in front of the bus

entered.detail: traffic signal showing red light suspended over the intersection
modern glass and concrete office building with multiple floors
covered bus stop with glass panels and bench on the sidewalk
circular regulatory sign mounted on a pole

segments.scene_description: The bus is stationary at a red traffic light in heavy rain. A white taxi waits directly ahead, while modern buildings line the street. The windshield wipers sweep continuously across the glass.

events.description: traffic light changes to green and bus begins accelerating
bus accelerates from stationary position through the intersection

agents.ego_description: accelerating through the green light following the taxi ahead

notable_agents.action: taxi accelerating through the intersection ahead of the bus

entered.detail: zebra crossing markings painted on the wet asphalt
ground floor shops with large display windows

segments.scene_description: The bus accelerates through the green traffic light, crossing the pedestrian zebra crossing. The taxi ahead pulls away, and commercial buildings with ground-floor shops become visible on the right side.

events.description: bus executes a right turn at the intersection

agents.ego_description: navigating a right turn and continuing down the wet city street

entered.detail: row of deciduous trees lining the left side of the street
residential building with balconies and large windows
triangular warning sign at the corner

segments.scene_description: The bus makes a right turn onto a tree-lined urban street. Residential apartment buildings with balconies appear on the right, while the taxi continues to move ahead in the distance.

events.description: bus approaches and begins following a large blue truck
bus comes to a stop behind the truck at a red traffic light

agents.ego_description: following traffic and gradually approaching the truck ahead before stopping

notable_agents.action: large blue truck driving ahead and braking for the red light

entered.detail: large commercial truck with blue cargo container and rear taillights
yellow and red striped awning over a shop entrance
red sedan parked along the left curb

segments.scene_description: The bus follows a large blue cargo truck down a commercial street lined with parked cars and storefronts. The truck gradually slows and stops at a red traffic light, with the bus stopping behind it.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection stopped at traffic signal

events.description: traffic light changes to green and traffic begins to move
bus accelerates from stop following the truck through the intersection

agents.ego_description: waiting at the red light behind the truck, then proceeding on green

notable_agents.action: large truck begins moving forward as the light turns green

entered.detail: cross street visible ahead with traffic signals

segments.scene_description: The bus waits at the red light behind the blue truck. After several seconds, the light turns green and the bus accelerates forward, following the truck through the intersection as the journey continues.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a bus cabin as it navigates a rain-slicked urban environment through a series of stops and turns. It begins stationary at a red light behind a white taxi, with windshield wipers sweeping continuously against a backdrop of modern city buildings. As the light turns green, the bus accelerates across a pedestrian crossing and passes ground-floor shops before turning right onto a tree-lined street flanked by residential apartments. The scene then shifts to a commercial district where the bus follows a large blue cargo truck past rows of parked cars and storefronts. Finally, after coming to a brief halt behind the truck at another red light, the bus accelerates forward once more to continue its journey through the intersection.
